ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pregnancy_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pregnancy record */,
  "mother_age" REAL /* Age of the mother when pregnant */,
  "maternal_age" REAL /* Age of the mother at the time of data collection */,
  "maternal_status" TEXT /* Status indicating if the mother is younger or older */,
  "weeks_pregnant" INTEGER /* Weeks of pregnancy at the time of record */,
  "birth_type" TEXT /* Type of birth (e.g., full term, premie) */,
  "visit_count" INTEGER /* Number of visits made during pregnancy */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the mother */,
  "weight_gain" INTEGER /* Weight gained during pregnancy in pounds */,
  "birth_weight" REAL /* Weight of the newborn at birth in pounds */,
  "low_birth_weight" TEXT /* Indicates if the newborn is of low birth weight */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the newborn */,
  "smoking_habit" TEXT /* Smoking habits of the mother during pregnancy */,
  "white_mother" TEXT /* Indicates if the mother is white */,
  "insurance_coverage" TEXT /* Insurance coverage for the mother */,
  "pre-existing_conditions" TEXT /* Pre-existing medical conditions for the mother */,
  "gestational_diabetes" TEXT /* Gestational diabetes for the mother */,
  "hypertension" TEXT /* Hypertension for the mother */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mothers" (
  "mother_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mother */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the mother */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the mother */,
  "smoking_habit" TEXT /* Smoking habits (e.g., smoker, nonsmoker) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the mother */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the mother */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the mother */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the mother */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mother_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "newborns" (
  "newborn_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each newborn */,
  "birth_weight" REAL /* Weight of the newborn at birth in pounds */,
  "low_birth_weight" TEXT /* Indicates if the newborn is of low birth weight */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the newborn */,
  "mother_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mother associated with the newborn */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the newborn */,
  "head_circumference" REAL /* Head circumference of the newborn */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("newborn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_newborns_mother_id FOREIGN KEY ("mother_id") REFERENCES mothers ("mother_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pregnancy record associated with the appointment */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "visit_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the visit */,
  "physician" TEXT /* Name of the physician */,
  "appointment_type" TEXT /* Type of appointment (e.g., routine check-up, ultrasound) */,
  "appointment_status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., scheduled, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES pregnancy_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the healthcare location */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the healthcare location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare provider */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the provider */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the provider */,
  "provider_type" TEXT /* Type of healthcare provider (e.g., obstetrician, pediatrician) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pregnancy record associated with the visit */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider seen during the visit */,
  "date_of_visit" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of visit (e.g., routine check-up, emergency) */,
  "visit_status" TEXT /* Status of the visit (e.g., scheduled, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES pregnancy_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health outcome record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pregnancy record associated with the outcome */,
  "mother_health_issue" TEXT /* Health issues faced by the mother */,
  "newborn_health_issue" TEXT /* Health issues faced by the newborn */,
  "outcome_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the health outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_outcomes_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES pregnancy_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "mother_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mother associated with the demographic record */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the mother */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the mother */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the family */,
  "family_size" INTEGER /* Family size */,
  "family_structure" TEXT /* Family structure (e.g., single parent, nuclear family) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_mother_id FOREIGN KEY ("mother_id") REFERENCES mothers ("mother_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcomes_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pregnancy record associated with the analysis */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* The outcome being analyzed (e.g., low birth weight) */,
  "factor" TEXT /* The factor being considered (e.g., maternal age, smoking) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis (e.g., increased risk, decreased risk) */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., correlation, regression) */,
  "analysis_result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcomes_analysis_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES pregnancy_records ("record_id")
)
